data.title: Samsonite enhances ecommerce with 3D images and AR for immersive buying
data.description: This initiative spans across Samsonite's brands, including TUMI and American Tourister, aiming to provide a more immersive and interactive shopping journey, the company says.

data.title: Recap: How online retailers used AI in 2024
data.description: Although generative AI remains a popular focus, retailers have been using AI and machine learning for more than just producing marketing copy and images. Online retailers used AI for personalization, retail media networks, checkout, fulfillment centers and more in 2024.

data.title: How US Foods acts on customer feedback to grow ecommerce
data.description: Realizing 72% of its customers cited food costs as their most pressing challenge, the big food-service distributor rolled out a digital food cost calculator — one of several tools along with AI-powered recommendations to lure nearly all customers into online ordering.

data.title: Recap: Here are the retailers that filed for bankruptcy in 2024
data.description: Although some retailers, like Joann, managed to emerge from bankruptcy in 2024, others had to close stores, offer going-out-of-business sales, or seek buyouts to keep their companies operating.

data.title: Swiss WorldCargo partners with Freightos to enhance digital freight options
data.description: Swiss WorldCargo’s services for selected markets across Europe, Asia, and the Americas will now be available on the WebCargo by Freightos platform.
